UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the application, who can be a customer, a professional, or an admin.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user, matches Firebase Auth UID.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

role.description: The role of the user within the application.

serviceIds.description: For professionals, a list of service IDs they can perform.

disabled.description: Whether the user account is disabled.

notes.description: Internal notes about the user (e.g., preferences, allergies).

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by the barber shop.

categoryId.description: Reference to the service's category ID.

featured.description: Whether the service should be featured on the landing page.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents an appointment scheduled with a customer for a specific professional.

customerName.description: Denormalized name of the client who booked the appointment.

customerPhotoURL.description: Denormalized URL of the client's profile picture.

servicePrice.description: Denormalized price of the service at time of booking.

status.description: The current status of the appointment.

cancellationReason.description: Reason for cancellation, if applicable (e.g., by client, by admin).

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice for services rendered.

paymentStatus.description: Payment status of the invoice (e.g., paid, unpaid, partially paid).

discountPercentage.description: Discount percentage offered by the promotion.

serviceIds.description: References to Services. (Relationship: Promotion N:N Service)

ScheduleSettings.title: Schedule Settings
ScheduleSettings.description: Represents the barbershop's opening hours and schedule configuration.

workingHours.description: Defines the standard working hours for each day of the week.

DaySetting.title: Day Setting
DaySetting.description: Represents the settings for a single day of the week.

isOpen.description: Whether the shop is open on this day.

breaks.description: A list of recurring break times for this day.

BreakTime.title: Break Time
BreakTime.description: Represents a recurring break time within a working day (e.g., lunch).

startTime.description: The start time of the break, e.g., '12:00'.

endTime.description: The end time of the break, e.g., '13:00'.

BlockedTime.title: Blocked Time
BlockedTime.description: Represents a time slot blocked by an admin, making it unavailable for appointments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the blocked time slot.

reason.description: Reason for blocking the time slot (e.g., 'Lunch', 'Holiday').

EstablishmentSettings.title: Establishment Settings
EstablishmentSettings.description: Represents the establishment's general information and branding.

about.description: The 'about' text for the landing page.

heroTitle.description: The main title for the hero section of the landing page.

heroSubtitle.description: The subtitle for the hero section of the landing page.

servicesTitle.description: The title for the services section on the landing page.

servicesSubtitle.description: The subtitle for the services section on the landing page.

address.description: The physical address of the establishment, shown in the footer.

whatsapp.description: The WhatsApp contact number for the establishment (only numbers).

instagram.description: The Instagram profile handle for the establishment (without the '@').

context.description: Additional context about the establishment to guide the AI in generating texts.

cancellationTimeLimitHours.description: Time limit in hours before an appointment that a client can cancel or reschedule.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, including their role (client, professional, admin).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores the specific schedule settings for a professional as a singleton document.

Stores time slots that are manually blocked by administrators and are unavailable for appointments.

definition.description: Stores the main branding and text settings for the establishment as a singleton document.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure has been updated to be more role-oriented. The 'customers' collection is now 'users', reflecting that a user can be a client, professional, or admin. Appointments and invoices have been moved to top-level collections to decouple them from a single user's data tree, preparing the system for more complex relationships, such as a professional's view of their own schedule. This flat structure simplifies queries and security rules, especially for features involving multiple user roles. Added professional-specific subcollections for scheduleSettings and blockedTimes to allow for individual schedule management.
